abstract.text: If the token has an error that’s inherent to the token itself and not its
surrounding structure, this defines the type of the error.
specifies at which offset the error occurred.

A Syntax node represents a tree of nodes with tokens at the leaves.
Each node has accessors for its known children, and allows efficient
iteration over the children through its
property.

to this node and each of its ancestors until a non-
value is produced, then returns that value.
